channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-8583] Interop: master<->2.8 sanity-sec test_27: mgs and active mismatch, 10 attempts
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Saurabh Tandan <saurabh.tandan@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/e1f301d0-7276-11e6-8afd-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_27 failed with the following error:

mgs and active  mismatch, 10 attempts

test log:

== sanity-sec test 27: test fileset in nodemap ======================================================= 12:02:45 (1472929365)
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.identity_upcall=NONE
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.identity_upcall=NONE
CMD: onyx-44vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add c0
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_range --name c0 --range 10.2.4.219@tcp
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_idmap --name c0 --idtype uid --idmap 60003:60000
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_idmap --name c0 --idtype gid --idmap 60003:60000
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_idmap --name c0 --idtype uid --idmap 60004:60002
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_idmap --name c0 --idtype gid --idmap 60004:60002
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n nodemap.active
CMD: onyx-44vm2 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add c1
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_range --name c1 --range 10.2.4.220@tcp
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_idmap --name c1 --idtype uid --idmap 60005:60001
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_idmap --name c1 --idtype gid --idmap 60005:60001
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_idmap --name c1 --idtype uid --idmap 60006:60002
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_idmap --name c1 --idtype gid --idmap 60006:60002
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n nodemap.active
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_activate 1
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n nodemap.active
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param nodemap.active
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
On MGS 10.2.4.225, active = nodemap.active=1
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
CMD: onyx-44vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
On onyx-44vm8 10.2.4.226, active = nodemap.active=0
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
CMD: onyx-44vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
On onyx-44vm8 10.2.4.226, active = nodemap.active=0
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
CMD: onyx-44vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
On onyx-44vm8 10.2.4.226, active = nodemap.active=0
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
CMD: onyx-44vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
On onyx-44vm8 10.2.4.226, active = nodemap.active=0
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
CMD: onyx-44vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
On onyx-44vm8 10.2.4.226, active = nodemap.active=0
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
CMD: onyx-44vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
On onyx-44vm8 10.2.4.226, active = nodemap.active=0
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
CMD: onyx-44vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
On onyx-44vm8 10.2.4.226, active = nodemap.active=0
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
CMD: onyx-44vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
On onyx-44vm8 10.2.4.226, active = nodemap.active=0
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
CMD: onyx-44vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
On onyx-44vm8 10.2.4.226, active = nodemap.active=0
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
CMD: onyx-44vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
On onyx-44vm8 10.2.4.226, active = nodemap.active=0
MGS
nodemap.active=1
OTHER - IP: 10.2.4.226
nodemap.active=0
 sanity-sec test_27: @@@@@@ FAIL: mgs and active  mismatch, 10 attempts

First seen on 08/06/2016

Info required for matching: sanity-sec 27
item.environment:
Interop: 2.8.0 EL7.2 Server/EL7.2 Client
Server: b2_8, build# 12
Client: master, build# 3431
item.summary: Interop: master<->2.8 sanity-sec test_27: mgs and active mismatch, 10 attempts

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
